payload.last_assistant_message:
PR created: **https://github.com/adobe-ai-pod/mas/pull/17**

**What was implemented:**
- Removed `<div slot="footer">` + `<a is="checkout-link">` (Buy now) from the `photoshop` template in `merch-card.plans.test.html`
- Removed the same footer CTA from the `photoshop-with-addon` template
- Cleared the `ctas` field in `fragment-photoshop.json` and `fragment-photography-plans.json` mock fragments (set to empty string)
- All informational content preserved; no orphaned wrappers left behind
